name: Alchemy
description: Enables the hunter to combine more items only combinable after activating Alchemy.

levels.name: Alchemy
levels.description: Enables the hunter to combine more items only combinable after activating Alchemy.

name: All Res
description: Increases or decreases the hunter's resistance to all elemental damages.

levels.name: All Res +10
levels.description: Adds 10 points to all element resistances.

levels.name: All Res +5
levels.description: Adds 5 points to all element resistances.

levels.name: All Res +3
levels.description: Adds 3 points to all element resistances.

levels.name: All Res -3
levels.description: Substracts 3 points to all element resistances.

levels.name: All Res -5
levels.description: Substracts 5 points to all element resistances.

levels.name: All Res -10
levels.description: Substracts 10 points to all element resistances.

name: Anti-Theft
description: Provides immunity to stealing.

name: AntiChamel
description: Provides immunity to all status ailments given by Chameleos, including Poison, Steal, and Fatigue.

levels.name: Fiery Protection
levels.description: Combination of Poison Negated, Steal No Effect, and Fatigue Cancellation

name: AntiDaora
description: Provides immunity to Snowman and Wind Press status.

levels.name: Frosty Protection
levels.description: Combination of Snow Resistance and Dragon Wind Breaker

name: AntiFireDrg
description: Provides higher resistance to fire-based elemental damage and cancels damage from Lava or Teostra / Lunastra's Aura.

levels.name: Metallic Protection
levels.description: Combination of Fire Res +10 and TerrainDamageNegate

name: Antiseptic
description: Provides immunity to Soiled status which can only be performed by Conga and Congalala.

levels.name: Antiseptic
levels.description: Provides immunity to Soiled status which can only be performed by Conga and Congalala.

name: Artisan
description: Visible sharpness will be added to the weapon.

levels.name: Sharpness +1
levels.description: Visible sharpness will be added to the weapon.

name: Attack
description: Increases or Decreases the hunter's attack power.

name: Auto-Guard
description: Enables automatically blocking attacks, if weapon permits.

levels.name: Auto-Guard
levels.description: Enables automatically blocking attacks, if weapon permits.

name: AutoReload
description: Automatically reloads one round into the chamber after firing, without needing to manually reload.

levels.name: Auto-Reload
levels.description: Automatically reloads one round into the chamber after firing, without needing to manually reload.

name: BBQ
description: Affects the success rate of cooking meat on a BBQ Spit.

levels.name: BBQ Celebrity
levels.description: Makes it easier to make Well-Done Steaks and makes it possible to cook Gourmet Steaks.

levels.name: So-called BBQ King
levels.description: Makes it hard to cook steaks.

name: Backpackng
description: Increases movement speed when carrying eggs and can fall from greater heights without breaking the eggs.

levels.name: Backpacking Expert
levels.description: Increases movement speed when carrying eggs and can fall from greater heights without breaking the eggs.

name: BombStrUp
description: Guarantees bombs combinations will succeed, and increases damage dealt from Bombs or bomb-based attacks by x1.5.

levels.name: Bomber
levels.description: Guarantees bombs combinations will succeed, and increases damage dealt from Bombs or bomb-based attacks by x1.5.

name: Capacity
description: Increases the number of rounds loaded per reload for certain ammo types.

levels.name: Capacity Up
levels.description: Increases the number of rounds loaded per reload for certain ammo types.

name: Carving
description: Affects Carving.

levels.name: Carving Celebrity
levels.description: Can carve one extra time off any carving.

levels.name: Carving Iron Man
levels.description: Carving won't be interrupted from a small attack e.g.: Vespoid or Hornetaur.

name: Cold Res
description: Affects the rate in which the hunter's stamina decreases.

levels.name: Cold Elimination[Lo]
levels.description: Immunity to Cold at specific areas.

name: ComradeAtk
description: Increases Felyne Comrade's attack (not shown).

name: ComradeDef
description: Increases Felyne Comrade's defense (not shown).

name: ComrdGuide
description: Increases Felyne Comrade's interest in quest.

levels.name: Comrade Guidance&Trade
levels.description: Increases Felyne Comrade experience and skill points after clearing quests.

levels.name: Comrade Guidance
levels.description: Increases Felyne Comrade experience points after clearing quests.

name: Constitutn
description: Decreases the amount of required stamina by rolling or diving.

levels.name: Constitution +2
levels.description: Stamina used to roll/dive is greatly reduced.

levels.name: Constitution +1
levels.description: Stamina used to roll/dive is halved.

name: Cooking
description: Affects the speed when consuming food items.

name: Defense
description: Increases or decreases hunter's defense.

name: Dragon Res
description: Increases or decreases the hunter's resistance to dragon-based elemental damage.

name: EdgeMaster
description: Gains initial sword sharpness and increased attack buff.

levels.name: Stellar Hunter
levels.description: Combination of Sharpness +1 and Attack Up (Large)

name: ElementAtk
description: Increases the damage of Fire, Water, Ice, Thunder, and Dragon elemental attacks by x1.2.

levels.name: Element Attack Up
levels.description: Increases the damage of Fire, Water, Ice, Thunder, and Dragon elemental attacks by x1.2.

name: Evade
description: Increases invulnerability time during dodges.

levels.name: Evade +2
levels.description: Greatly increases invincibility time during rolling and diving.

levels.name: Evade +1
levels.description: Slightly increases invincibility time during rolling and diving.

name: Evade Dist
description: Increases covered distance when dodge rolling and diving.

levels.name: Evade Distance Up
levels.description: Increases covered distance when dodge rolling and diving.

name: Everlastng
description: Affects the longevity of item effects (i.e. Hot Drink and Cool Drink).

levels.name: Item Usage Decline
levels.description: Items effect's duration is cut by 40%.

name: Expert
description: Each Reckless Abandon level adds or subtracts Affinity in 10% increments. For weapons with 0-25% affinity, the skill will add an extra 5% at blue sharpness, and 10% at white or purple sharpness.

name: Faint
description: Affects lasting time of Faint status. The hunter can recover faster by repeatedly tapping all buttons.

name: Fate
description: Increases or decreases amount of rewards.

name: Fatigue
description: Affects lasting time of Fatigue status, which can only be performed by Chameleos and Vespoid Queen

name: Fencing
description: Prevents attacks from being deflected, so combos won't be interrupted.

levels.name: ESP
levels.description: Prevents attacks from being deflected, so combos won't be interrupted.

name: Fire Res
description: Increases or decreases the hunter's resistance to fire-based elemental damage.

name: Fishing
description: Increases the time to hook fish when the bait is eaten.

levels.name: Fishing Expert
levels.description: Increases the time to hook fish when the bait is eaten.

name: Fury
description: Saves the hunter from deadly hit and generates more damage during low health.

name: Gathering
description: Affects the amount of gathering at one location.

name: Gluttony
description: Affects a chance for receiving a 25 point stamina increase when using items.

levels.name: Scavenger
levels.description: Can get a stamina increase from healing items.

levels.name: Filled Up
levels.description: Can get a stamina increase from fish steaks.

name: Guard
description: Affects weapons that are given the ability to block.

levels.name: Guard +2
levels.description: Block requires even less stamina, and hunter receives even less damage and push back.

levels.name: Guard +1
levels.description: Block requires less stamina, and hunter receives less damage and push back.

levels.name: Guard -1
levels.description: Block requires more stamina, and hunter receives more damage and push back.

name: Guard Up
description: Enables the ability to block previous attacks that could not be blocked, Ex: Gravios Beam, Fatalis Fireball, etc.

levels.name: Guard Inc
levels.description: Enables the ability to block previous attacks that could not be blocked, Ex: Gravios Beam, Fatalis Fireball, etc.

name: Gunnery
description: Gunnery King increases the damage of BallistaS, CannonS, Gunlance Shells and Wyvern's Fire by x1.1, and increases CragS damage by x1.5. Gunnery Master only increases both BallistaS and CannonS.

levels.name: Gunnery King
levels.description: Increases damage of BallistaS, CannonS, Gunlance Shells, Wyvern's Fire, and CragS.

name: Guts
description: Saves the hunter from instant death hit when their health is above 65.

levels.name: Guts
levels.description: Saves the hunter from instant death hit when their health is above 65.

name: Health
description: Increases or decreases the hunter's maximum health.

name: HearProtct
description: Provides immunity to screams, roars, etc.

name: Heat Res
description: Affects the rate in which the hunter's health decreases.

levels.name: Heat Cancel [Lo]
levels.description: Immunity to Heat at specific areas.

name: HiSpdGathr
description: Increases the speed of Carving, Mining, Gathering, and Bugnetting.

levels.name: High Speed Gathering
levels.description: Increases the speed of Carving, Mining, Gathering, and Bugnetting.

name: Horn
description: 50% chance to prevent flute breaking and adds 1 minute to all Hunting Horn songs.

levels.name: Flute Expert
levels.description: 50% chance to prevent flute breaking and adds 1 minute to all Hunting Horn songs.

name: Hunger
description: Affects the rate in which the hunter's stamina bar increases or decreases.

name: Ice Res
description: Increases or decreases the hunter's resistance to ice-based elemental damage.

name: Map
description: Affects the map's observation.

levels.name: FarSight
levels.description: See the entire map without the map item.

levels.name: Map Unavailable
levels.description: Can't see map even with the map item.

name: MixSucRate
description: Increases or decreases all combinations success rates.

name: NormS Up
description: Increase damage of NormS/Rapid Shots by +10%

name: Paralysis
description: Affects lasting time of paralysis status.

name: PelletS Up
description: Increases damage of PelletS/Spread Shots by +30%

name: Perceive
description: Painted or Auto-tracked target turns yellow when it's ready to be captured.

levels.name: Tranquilizing Guru
levels.description: Painted or Auto-tracked target turns yellow when it's ready to be captured. However, the target must be painted manually (or the hunter has activated the Autotracker skill).

name: PierceS Up
description: Increase damage of PierceS/Pierce Shots by +10%

name: Poison
description: Affects lasting time of poison status.

name: Potential
description: Defense and strength changes when health is below 40%.

levels.name: Worry
levels.description: Increases defense but cuts attack by 30%.

name: Precision
description: Affects the accuracy of the shots.

name: Protection
description: Affects the chance of preventing or receiving extra damage.

levels.name: Divine Protection
levels.description: 20% chance of receiving 30% less damage when taking damage.

levels.name: Demonic Protection
levels.description: 20% chance of receiving 30% more damage when taking damage.

name: PsychicVis
description: Affects the hunter's ability to keep track of the monster.

levels.name: Autotracker
levels.description: Shows on map a constant indication of where a large monster is,i.e. a dragon/wyvern has a mini dragon picture, a "drome" is just a blob, certain pelagus (congalala & blangonga) are shown as a monkey.This skill also shows how active a certain monster is, i.e. blue is calm, red is angry or when the monster has noticed the hunter.

levels.name: Detect
levels.description: Provides detailed information on painted monster (blue when calm, red when angry).However, it's not constant so the hunter still have to paint it manually.

name: Quake Res
description: Provides immunity to Quake status.

name: Rec Speed
description: Affects how fast the red portion of hunter's health recovers.

levels.name: Damage Rec Speed +2
levels.description: Red portion of health recovers 4x faster.

levels.name: Damage Rec Speed +1
levels.description: Red portion of health recovers 2x faster.

levels.name: Damage Rec Speed -1
levels.description: Red portion of health recovers 2x slower.

name: Recovery
description: Increases or decreases the amount of health recovered by healing items.

name: ResistSts
description: Provides immunity to all abnormal status effects.

levels.name: Self-Defense
levels.description: Combination of Paralysis Negated, Sleep Negated, Poison Negated, and Faint Negated

name: Sharpness
description: Affects the rate in which the weapons' sharpness lost increases or decreases.

levels.name: Sharp Sword
levels.description: Decreases sharpness lost on weapon by half.

levels.name: Blunt
levels.description: Increases sharpness lost on weapon by x2.

name: ShortCharg
description: Increases or decreases the amount of time required to charge Bows, Greatswords or Hammers.

name: Shot Mix
description: Maxes out the amount of ammo / coatings that can be made on each combination.

levels.name: Bullet Limit
levels.description: Maxes out the amount of ammo / coatings that can be made on each combination.

name: Sleep
description: Affects lasting time of sleep status.

name: Sneak
description: Increases or decreases the chances when a wyvern notices the hunter.

levels.name: Stealth
levels.description: Monsters will target hunter less often than your teammates.

levels.name: Taunt
levels.description: Monsters will target hunter more often than your teammates.

name: Snow Res
description: Provides immunity to Snowman status, which can only be performed by Giadrome, Blangonga, Tigrex (Snowy Mountains), Kushala Daora (Snowy Mountains), and Ukanlos

levels.name: Snow Resistance
levels.description: Provides immunity to Snowman status, which can only be performed by Giadrome, Blangonga, Tigrex (Snowy Mountains), Kushala Daora (Snowy Mountains), and Ukanlos

name: Spc Attack
description: Increases the numerical number displayed on the weapon's status ailment (poison, paralysis, and sleep), if available, by x1.125.

levels.name: Abnormal Sts Atk Up
levels.description: Increases the numerical number displayed on the weapon's status ailment (poison, paralysis, and sleep), if available, by x1.125.

name: SpeedSetup
description: Guarantees Trap combinations will succeed, and speeds up trap and bomb-setting time.

levels.name: Trap Master
levels.description: Guarantees Trap combinations will succeed, and speeds up trap and bomb-setting time.

name: Stamina
description: Affects the amount of required stamina when performing any kind of stamina-draining actions (Running, Demonizing, Charging Bow/Hammer/Lance).

name: SteadyHand
description: Increases damage to all type of attacks.

levels.name: Straight & True
levels.description: Increases damage to all type of attacks.

name: SwdShrpner
description: Affects the usage of Whetstones.

name: Sword Draw
description: Affects the weapon unsheathing attacks. Any unsheathing attack will result in a 100% chance of a Critical hit.

levels.name: Art of Unsheathing
levels.description: Affects the weapon unsheathing attacks. Any unsheathing attack will result in a 100% chance of a Critical hit.

name: Terrain
description: Affects terrain damage received. Teostra's Aura, Lunastra's Aura and stepping on the lava is considered as terrain damage.

name: Throw
description: Increases distance of thrown items (throwing knives, stones, paintballs, flash/sonic/tranq bombs) and reduces the chance of boomerangs breaking.

levels.name: Throwing Skill Up
levels.description: Increases distance of thrown items (throwing knives, stones, paintballs, flash/sonic/tranq bombs) and reduces the chance of boomerangs breaking.

name: Thunder Res
description: Increases or decreases the hunter's resistance to thunder-based elemental damage.

name: Torso Inc
description: Adds the same value of skill points of the plate armor. If a plate has +2 points, one Torso Inc will increase its value to +4, and the second Torso Inc. will increase its value by another +2 so it becomes +6. Unfortunately, it also applies to the negative skill points as well.

levels.name: Torso Up
levels.description: Doubles the chest piece's contribution. Stacks at +20 (triples), +30 (quadruples), etc.

name: Tranquilzr
description: Captured monster yields more rewards.

levels.name: Tranquilizing Celeb
levels.description: Often will increase the chance of more rewards from captures.

levels.name: Tranquilizing Whiz
levels.description: Sometimes will increase the chance of more rewards from captures.

name: Water Res
description: Increases or decreases the hunter's resistance to water-based elemental damage.

name: Whim
description: Affects Pickaxes, Bugnets and Flutes breaking.

levels.name: Spectre's Whim
levels.description: Doubles chance of breaking 25% of the time.

levels.name: Devil's Whim
levels.description: Doubles chance of breaking 50% of the time.

name: Wide Area
description: Comrade will also get healed when healing items is used.

name: WindPress
description: Provides immunity to Wind Press.
